title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
